company.name: Zenarate
company.tagline: Get to know the World's Leading AI Platform for Front Line Performance.

posts.text: Throwback Tuesday to CCW in Nashville. The team is back at hashtag#CCW in Las Vegas this week to showcase Evolve, an AI-powered conversation automation platform that makes Zenarate the first and only closed-loop frontline performance platform. This latest innovation brings together training, coaching, analytics, and AI agents in a single system, enabling superior frontline performance across human and AI teams. Stop by booth #427 to meet the team Michael Sharelis, Daniel Urban, Amani Trice, Brian Tuite, Dan Schulz, Cristian Rivera, and Jaie Clark to learn how to develop confident new and tenured agents as well as create continuity between humans and AI interactions.

posts.text: Imagine if…From a distance, the Sphere in Las Vegas is one image. A promo for Wizard of Oz. A swirl of colors. A soccer ball. It is the manifestation of human and technology working together. If one element of the system falls down, the experience is diminished.Imagine investing the time and resources on a system that doesn’t deliver the experience it was intended to deliver.It’s the same for your customers. If your customer experience system between phone, in-person, and online is not coordinated, then your customers question the value of the relationship with your brand.  Imagine if the customer experience could work seamlessly between human and AI. Next week, Zenarate will be attending Customer Contact Week (hashtag#CCW) in Las Vegas to share Evolve, an AI-powered conversation automation platform that makes Zenarate the first and only closed-loop frontline performance platform.The platform brings together training, coaching, analytics, and AI agents in a single system, enabling superior frontline performance across human and AI teams.Photo by Marianne Gerber on Unsplash

posts.text: Zenarate and 23 companies are up-skilling the UK’s banking industry. This new industry coalition is led by Zopa Bank and ClearScore and aims to upskill 100,000 banking and fintech professionals in AI disciplines by 2030.We’re proud to be joining Jobs2030 as the AI Simulation + LXP platform provider, helping build AI skills proficiency across the UK banking sector. This announcement launches the 2026 curriculum, beginning with 5 courses rolling out now, and expanding to 12 by the end of the year across compliance, engineering, operations and product functions. The campaign is FREE for companies to join and built around pillars of technology, content, training, hiring and advocacy.Get involved at www.jobs2030.ai hashtag#Jobs2030 hashtag#AI hashtag#Fintech hashtag#Banking hashtag#FutureOfWork hashtag#GenerativeAI hashtag#Skills hashtag#FinancialServices

posts.text: Most contact centers are investing more in training than ever. Performance still isn't moving.It's not a people problem. It's a system problem.Yesterday at CCW Executive Exchange in Austin, our VP of Account Management, Liz Powell, took the stage to break down why and what actually works.Our take: training, QA, and coaching don't fail because the tools are bad or the people aren't trying. They fail because they're disconnected. Feedback is delayed. Learning is separated from live work. And when AI gets layered onto that fragmented system, you don't fix the problem, you just get more dashboards of the same broken outcomes.The organizations seeing real performance gains aren't adding more to the stack. They're rethinking the system entirely and building tight feedback loops where practice, live performance, and coaching continuously inform each other.Because practice doesn't make perfect.Feedback loops do.Thank you to the CCW Executive Exchange for the opportunity to be in the room with so many sharp CX leaders. 🙌

posts.text:
Great perspective from Eric Ludwig and RISE Technology Advisors.We see this all the time. That knowing what to say isn’t the same as being able to navigate real, complex conversations in the moment.Simulation gives agents and associates a place to practice, make mistakes, and build confidence before they ever get on a live call.That shift from knowledge to applied skill is where real performance starts.
      
    
  
          
          …more

AI promised transformation. 2026 demands execution.After years of hype, contact center leaders are learning a hard truth: technology alone doesn’t drive results.In our latest article, we break down the 7 contact center technology trends that will actually move the needle in 2026—starting with clean data, smarter training, better self-service, and scalable coaching.Swipe through for the first four.Read the full breakdown at the link in the comments.hashtag#ContactCenter hashtag#CustomerExperience hashtag#AIinCX hashtag#ContactCenterTrends hashtag#FutureOfCX
      
    
  
          
          …more

Just because there's a skills gap doesn't mean you should coach to it...In our latest round of research and frontline performance we've dug deep into understanding which skills and behaviors actually drive customer outcomes.What we've found is that there are a lot of reasons that growth in skills and QA scores don't lead to the CX + KPI outcomes you're targeting. Knowing which is which is not a diagnostic luxury. It is the prerequisite for any meaningful coaching or personalized learning.More in my latest blog article. 👇https://lnkd.in/e_DEnyqS
      
    
  
          
          …more

At last year's Innovation Summit, we told you to Expect Fireworks. We (and Disney quite literally) delivered—check out the highlights below.This year? We're going to Ignite Performance.Here's what's coming to the 2026 Zenarate Innovation Summit happening May 7-8 in Orlando, FL:— A bold new take on what frontline performance really means— A former astrophysicist making the scientific case for smarter, data-driven coaching— Real customer voices sharing what's broken and what's working in AutoQA— A vision for humans + AI agents working as one unified frontline— A reserved terrace within Epcot to watch the ‘Luminous’ fireworks showIf you were there last year, you already know you can't miss this. If you weren't, now you know what's at stake.Seats are limited so don't miss your chance to be in the room.Save your seat: https://lnkd.in/erekg-sbhashtag#IgnitePerformance hashtag#ZenarateInnovationSummit hashtag#FrontlinePerformance hashtag#AIInnovation
